federalFunds.description: Effective or target federal funds rate used as the core U.S. overnight policy benchmark.

inflationRate.description: Rate of change in the general price level over time.

GDP.description: Total value of goods and services produced in the economy.

unemploymentRate.description: Share of the labor force that is unemployed but actively seeking work.

steps: Step 1: Extract causal graph nodes from text
Step 3: Detect explicit policy stance + directional economic signals
Step 4: Use Abel Markov blanket to distinguish mechanism-neutral from stance-H/D
Step 5: Aggregate signals using causal priority
metadata.key_insight: Abel blankets reveal: inflation UP -> hawkish (inflationRate->federalFunds), inflation DOWN -> dovish, mechanism descriptions -> neutral. GDP/employment strength -> hawkish (GDP->federalFunds), weakness -> dovish.
